endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1alpha/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified worker pool. Returns a long running operation, which contains a `google.protobuf.Empty` response on completion. While the long running operation is in progress, any call to `GetWorkerPool` returns a worker pool in state `DELETING`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1alpha/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing worker pool with a specified size and/or configuration. Returns a long running operation, which contains a worker pool on completion. While the long running operation is in progress, any call to `GetWorkerPool` returns a worker pool in state `UPDATING`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha/{name}:testNotify
endpoints.description: Sends a test notification to the specified instance. Returns a `google.protobuf.Empty` on success.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/{parent}/instances
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha/{parent}/instances
endpoints.description: Creates a new instance in the specified region. Returns a long running operation which contains an instance on completion. While the long running operation is in progress, any call to `GetInstance` returns an instance in state `CREATING`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha/{parent}/workerpools
endpoints.description: Lists worker pools in an instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha/{parent}/workerpools
endpoints.description: Creates a new worker pool with a specified size and configuration. Returns a long running operation which contains a worker pool on completion. While the long running operation is in progress, any call to `GetWorkerPool` returns a worker pool in state `CREATING`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
